questionHtml:
A light source of power P is observed from a distance d. The power of the source is then halved.

At what distance from the source will the intensity be the same as before?

A.  d2

B.  d2

C.  d4

D.  d8

meta.title: A light source of power P is observed from a distance d. The power of the source is then halved. At what distance from the source will the intensity be the same as before? A. d2 B.
